author: gb9t
content: Phase C /loop iter 36: 2 Tier-3 net/sched docs (multi-queue + TSN time-aware shapers). net/sched/sch-mqprio.md (multi-queue priority qdisc: struct tc_mqprio_qopt w/ prio_tc_map[16] + per-TC offset+count tile, 2 modes (DCB w/ DCBNL integration + CHANNEL w/ per-TC min/max rate), HW offload via ndo_setup_tc, IEEE 802.1Qbu frame preemption via TCA_MQPRIO_TC_ENTRY_FP — 10 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open) + net/sched/sch-taprio.md (IEEE 802.1Qbv TSN time-aware shaper: GCL gate-control-list w/ cmd+gate_mask+interval, cycle_time validation, admin+oper schedule transition atomicity at base_time+N*cycle, 3 modes (sw hrtimer / txtime-assist w/ etf inner / full HW offload), CLOCK_TAI PTP-driven, frame preemption integration; OWNS models/net/sch_taprio.tla TSN time-window correctness theorem — 12 REQ / 10 AC, 0 open). 6 upstream paths validated against baseline 27a26ccfd528. Total: 111 .design docs. net/sched: 8 of 18 children done. Next: net/sched/sch-fq.md (TCP_PACING-aware FQ for sender-side fair-queueing) + net/sched/cls-flower.md (5-tuple+meta flower classifier — most-used in Cilium/CNI/openvswitch deployments).
